title: FinnGen Workbench
description: The FinnGen Workbench provides an interactive computational environment for genomic analyses. Run polygenic risk scores, colocalization, Mendelian randomization, and custom R scripts against FinnGen R10 summary statistics.
tips: The workbench provides pre-loaded FinnGen R10 summary statistics — no data download needed.
Use the Script panel to write and execute custom R code using the finngen and MendelianRandomization packages.
PRS calculations use pre-computed LD reference panels from the Finnish population for accurate score estimates.
Save your analysis scripts to the session library for reuse across future workbench sessions.
Visualizations produced in the workbench can be exported as PNG, PDF, or SVG files.
